popupSignInButton.description: Sign in button label — Austrian preference: 'einloggen' over 'anmelden'

popupSignOutButton.description: Sign out button label — Austrian preference: 'ausloggen' over 'abmelden'

optionsSignedIn.description: Account status when signed in — Austrian preference: 'eingeloggt' over 'angemeldet'

optionsNotSignedIn.description: Account status when not signed in — Austrian preference: 'nicht eingeloggt' over 'nicht angemeldet'

optionsSignOutButton.description: Sign out button on options page — Austrian preference: 'ausloggen' over 'abmelden'

optionsSignInLink.description: Link to sign in via the web app — Austrian preference: 'einloggen' over 'anmelden'
